name: natroc-awareness
description: Load compact installed Natroc plugin awareness at session start so agents can route tasks to matching plugin skills without dumping every plugin file into context.

interface.shortDescription: Route tasks to installed Natroc plugins.
interface.longDescription: Natroc Awareness gives agents a compact inventory of installed Natroc plugins and a routing skill for choosing the right plugin capability without loading every plugin document into context.
defaultPrompt: Analyze my task and route it to the most suitable installed Natroc plugin before taking any action.
Check if any Natroc plugins match my request domain and invoke the right skill for me.
List all Natroc plugins installed in this session and summarize what each one handles.
